query:
INSERT INTO progression_pathways (name, description, pillar, stage_1_title, stage_1_duration_months, stage_2_title, stage_2_duration_months, stage_3_title, stage_3_requirements, stage_4_title, stage_4_requirements, skills_required, certifications_required, estimated_timeline_months, success_metrics) VALUES
('Land Stewardship Pathway', 'Property management, land development, and agricultural work progression', 'LAND', 'Property Assistant', 24, 'Property Manager Contractor', 12, 'Property Management Business Owner', 'LLC formation, EIN, business bank account, 3 managed properties', 'House Member', 'Active 508 membership, community reinvestment compliance, mentoring new members', 'Property maintenance, tenant relations, financial management, land assessment', 'Property Management Certification, Real Estate License (optional)', 48, 'Properties managed, tenant satisfaction, revenue generated, new members mentored'),
('Education & Knowledge Pathway', 'Teaching, curriculum development, and knowledge sharing progression', 'AIR', 'Teaching Assistant', 24, 'Instructor Contractor', 12, 'Education Services Business Owner', 'LLC formation, EIN, business bank account, curriculum portfolio', 'House Member', 'Active 508 membership, community reinvestment compliance, mentoring new members', 'Curriculum design, instruction delivery, student assessment, content creation', 'Teaching Certification, Subject Matter Expertise', 48, 'Students taught, courses developed, completion rates, new educators mentored'),
('Wellness & Healing Pathway', 'Health services, counseling, and healing arts progression', 'WATER', 'Wellness Coordinator', 24, 'Health Services Contractor', 12, 'Wellness Business Owner', 'LLC formation, EIN, business bank account, client portfolio', 'House Member', 'Active 508 membership, community reinvestment compliance, mentoring new members', 'Health assessment, counseling, program design, client relations', 'Health Coaching Certification, Counseling License (if applicable)', 48, 'Clients served, program completion rates, health outcomes, new practitioners mentored'),
('Business & Finance Pathway', 'Financial literacy, business coaching, and entrepreneurship progression', 'SELF', 'Business Support Specialist', 24, 'Business Consultant Contractor', 12, 'Business Consulting Firm Owner', 'LLC formation, EIN, business bank account, client portfolio', 'House Member', 'Active 508 membership, community reinvestment compliance, mentoring new members', 'Financial analysis, business planning, coaching, market research', 'Business Certification, Financial Literacy Certification', 48, 'Businesses launched, revenue growth achieved, financial literacy improvements, new consultants mentored');
